text: Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. One or two showers later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
